description: ReZ Error Knowledge Base — centralized registry for all ecosystem errors

errors.title: Razorpay webhook signature verification failed
errors.root_cause: Webhook payload was tampered with during transit or the webhook secret was rotated without updating the service config. The HMAC-SHA256 signature computed server-side did not match the signature sent by Razorpay.
errors.fix: 1. Verify webhook secret matches RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var. 2. Check for proxy interference (Cloudflare, load balancer) stripping/adding headers. 3. Use raw body for signature computation, not parsed JSON. 4. If secret was rotated, update env var and redeploy.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Webhook endpoint secured with HMAC verification in all environments
prevention.test_added: Test webhook signature verification with tampered payloads
prevention.validation_added: Raw body must be preserved for signature computation

errors.title: Razorpay API request timed out during payment capture
errors.root_cause: Razorpay API responded slower than the 10s timeout threshold. The capture operation was initiated but no response was received, leaving the payment in an inconsistent PENDING state.
errors.fix: 1. Query Razorpay API for payment status using the payment_id. 2. If capture succeeded, reconcile local state. 3. If still pending, retry with idempotency key. 4. Alert if duplicate capture is detected.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Increase timeout to 30s with retry logic for capture operations
prevention.test_added: Mock Razorpay slow responses in payment capture tests
prevention.validation_added: Poll Razorpay for final status before marking payment as failed

errors.title: Payment was processed twice due to missing idempotency check
errors.root_cause: The webhook handler did not check Redis for duplicate payment_id before processing. A network retry caused Razorpay to send the same payment.completed event twice, resulting in double wallet credit.
errors.fix: 1. Check Redis SETNX for payment_id with 24h TTL before processing. 2. If key exists, skip processing and return 200. 3. Reverse duplicate wallet credit via compensating transaction. 4. Add idempotency logging.

prevention.ci_rule_added: All webhook handlers must use Redis deduplication before processing
prevention.test_added: Test webhook handler with duplicate events
prevention.validation_added: PaymentIdempotencyGuard middleware added to all webhook routes

errors.title: Payment status transition from FAILED to CAPTURED rejected
errors.root_cause: A race condition occurred where Razorpay webhook arrived after the payment was manually marked as FAILED by an admin operation. The FSM rejected the invalid FAILED->CAPTURED transition.
errors.fix: 1. Use MongoDB transaction to lock payment record during status updates. 2. Query current status within transaction before applying transition. 3. If webhook is newer, allow override with audit log. 4. Notify admin of conflicting state.

prevention.ci_rule_added: All payment updates must use MongoDB transactions
prevention.test_added: Test concurrent payment status updates
prevention.architectural_constraint: Webhooks must acquire lock before updating payment status

errors.title: Refund request amount exceeds captured payment amount
errors.root_cause: Client requested refund for 5000 INR but only 3000 INR was captured due to partial capture. The refund service validated total order amount instead of captured amount.
errors.fix: 1. Update refund validation to use captured_amount, not order_amount. 2. Calculate available refund as captured_amount minus already_refunded. 3. Reject requests exceeding available amount. 4. Return clear error message with available refund amount.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Refund validation must check against captured_amount
prevention.test_added: Test refund scenarios with partial captures and multiple refunds

errors.title: Product inventory over-reserved due to concurrent order requests
errors.root_cause: Two simultaneous requests for the same product with quantity 1 each both read inventory as 1 (optimistic read). Both reservations succeeded, resulting in -1 inventory count.
errors.fix: 1. Use MongoDB findOneAndUpdate with $inc and $gte filter. 2. Retry with exponential backoff on reservation conflict. 3. Reject order if inventory unavailable after 3 retries. 4. Add inventory_consistency_check cron job.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Inventory updates must use atomic operations with MongoDB
prevention.test_added: Concurrent inventory reservation load test with 100 parallel requests
prevention.architectural_constraint: Inventory check and reservation must be atomic

errors.title: Order fulfilled after cancellation due to event ordering delay
errors.root_cause: User cancelled order, cancellation event was queued. Before cancellation was processed, fulfillment service picked up the order from an older queue state and shipped it.
errors.fix: 1. Add order version/epoch to all events. 2. Fulfillment must check order status is still PENDING before shipping. 3. Cancellation should use Saga pattern with compensation. 4. Add 'cancelled_at' timestamp to prevent stale reads.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Fulfillment service must validate order status before shipping
prevention.test_added: Test concurrent cancel and fulfill operations
prevention.architectural_constraint: Order status must be re-validated before state-changing operations

errors.title: Fulfillment service returned 503 during order processing
errors.root_cause: Fulfillment service pod was OOM-killed during deployment. Order service was calling fulfillment API without proper circuit breaker, causing requests to hang until timeout.
errors.fix: 1. Implement circuit breaker with 5 failures threshold. 2. Return 503 with retry-after header. 3. Queue order for retry via BullMQ. 4. Add health check monitoring for fulfillment service.

prevention.ci_rule_added: All external service calls must have circuit breaker
prevention.test_added: Test order processing with simulated fulfillment failures
prevention.validation_added: Add resilience4j patterns to service communication

errors.title: Order creation rejected due to missing required field
errors.root_cause: Client sent order with shipping_address.postal_code missing. Zod validation was added but client SDK had not been updated, causing schema mismatch.
errors.fix: 1. Update client SDK to include postal_code field. 2. Return 400 with detailed validation errors. 3. Add schema version to API contracts. 4. Implement backward-compatible schema evolution.

prevention.ci_rule_added: API schema changes require client SDK updates
prevention.test_added: Integration tests with strict schema validation

errors.title: JWT access token expired during API request
errors.root_cause: Access token TTL is 15 minutes but mobile client was caching token incorrectly. Token was refreshed but old cached token was still being used for some requests.
errors.fix: 1. Clear token cache on refresh. 2. Implement token refresh retry logic in client SDK. 3. Return 401 with refresh_hint instead of generic unauthorized. 4. Add token_expiry field to response for client sync.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Client SDK must handle token refresh automatically
prevention.test_added: Test auth flow with token expiration scenarios

errors.title: JWT signature verification failed
errors.root_cause: JWT_SECRET was rotated during routine security maintenance but services were not restarted simultaneously. Some pods had old secret, some had new secret, causing signature verification failures.
errors.fix: 1. Use blue-green secret rotation: add new secret as additional valid key. 2. Gradually migrate tokens to new secret. 3. Remove old secret after 24h. 4. Use secret management service with atomic updates.

prevention.ci_rule_added: JWT secret rotation must be backward compatible for 24h
prevention.architectural_constraint: Support multiple valid JWT signing keys during rotation

errors.title: API rate limit exceeded for user authentication endpoint
errors.root_cause: Automated test suite was running against production-like environment with 10k login attempts. Rate limiter blocked further requests causing legitimate users to be rejected.
errors.fix: 1. Implement tiered rate limits (100/min for auth, 1000/min for other endpoints). 2. Add X-RateLimit-Retry-After header. 3. Exclude internal IPs from rate limiting. 4. Add per-client-key rate limits for API consumers.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Test suites must use dedicated test accounts with no rate limits
prevention.test_added: Rate limit behavior tests with 10k concurrent requests

errors.title: Session ID not regenerated after login
errors.root_cause: Security vulnerability: session ID was not regenerated after successful authentication. Attacker could hijack session by knowing pre-login session ID.
errors.fix: 1. Regenerate session ID using express-session.regenerate() after login. 2. Invalidate old session data. 3. Add session fixation protection middleware. 4. Set session.cookie.secure = true.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Session regeneration required after authentication
prevention.test_added: Security test for session fixation attacks

errors.title: X-Internal-Token validation failed for service-to-service call
errors.root_cause: Payment service was calling wallet service but INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKENS_JSON had outdated token. Service was redeployed with new token but calling service still had old env.
errors.fix: 1. Synchronize service tokens across all services before deployment. 2. Use service mesh for mTLS instead of manual tokens. 3. Implement token rotation with graceful validation of both old and new tokens.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Service token rotation must coordinate all dependent services
prevention.architectural_constraint: Prefer service mesh (Istio) over manual token-based auth

errors.title: MongoDB connection pool limit reached
errors.root_cause: Connection pool size was 100 but 150 concurrent requests were queued. Long-running aggregation queries were holding connections while new requests waited.
errors.fix: 1. Increase pool size to 500 with maxPoolSize config. 2. Add connection timeout of 5s. 3. Implement request queuing with timeout. 4. Identify and optimize slow aggregation queries. 5. Add connection pool monitoring.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Connection pool metrics must be monitored with alerts
prevention.test_added: Load test with connection pool stress
prevention.validation_added: Add query timeout to all MongoDB operations

errors.title: MongoDB transaction timed out waiting for commit
errors.root_cause: Transaction included updating 50 order items with complex aggregation pipeline. Transaction timeout was set to 5s but operation took 8s due to large dataset.
errors.fix: 1. Increase transaction timeout to 30s for complex operations. 2. Break large transactions into smaller saga steps. 3. Add indexes for frequently queried fields. 4. Consider eventual consistency for non-critical updates.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Large transactions must be broken into saga steps
prevention.test_added: Transaction timeout handling tests

errors.title: Duplicate key error on payment_id field
errors.root_cause: Razorpay sent two payment.completed webhooks for same payment_id within 100ms. First webhook created the payment record. Second webhook tried to insert duplicate payment_id.
errors.fix: 1. Use upsert instead of insert for webhook handling. 2. Handle duplicate key error gracefully with findOneAndUpdate. 3. Ensure idempotency check happens before DB write.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Webhook handlers must use upsert operations
prevention.test_added: Test duplicate webhook scenarios

errors.title: MongoDB primary node election caused write failures
errors.root_cause: Primary MongoDB node was restarted for maintenance. During 15s election period, writes failed with NotPrimaryOrSecondary error. Application did not have proper retry logic.
errors.fix: 1. Implement retry logic with readConcern: majority for critical writes. 2. Use MongoDB driver auto-retry on transient errors. 3. Add retry-after delays for election periods. 4. Schedule maintenance during low-traffic windows.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Database operations must retry on transient election errors
prevention.test_added: Test behavior during replica set failover

errors.title: OpenAI API quota exceeded for intent classification
errors.root_cause: Monthly OpenAI API budget was exhausted. Intent classification requests were failing with 429 status. Service had no fallback to cached results.
errors.fix: 1. Check usage before API call, reject early if quota < 10%. 2. Implement fallback to rule-based classification. 3. Cache frequent intents with 24h TTL. 4. Add quota monitoring alerts.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Quota check required before API calls
prevention.test_added: Test fallback behavior when API unavailable
prevention.architectural_constraint: Always have local fallback for ML classification

errors.title: Anthropic Claude API request timed out
errors.root_cause: Intent enrichment request to Claude took >60s, exceeding the 60s timeout. Request was cancelled but partial response was generated and cached incorrectly.
errors.fix: 1. Increase timeout to 120s for Claude requests. 2. Implement streaming with partial result handling. 3. Cache successful responses with intent_hash key. 4. Add request cancellation handling.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Streaming response handling required for LLM calls
prevention.test_added: Test with slow LLM responses

errors.title: Stripe webhook signature verification failed
errors.root_cause: Stripe webhook was forwarded through API gateway which modified headers. Gateway removed or altered the stripe-signature header, causing verification to fail.
errors.fix: 1. Configure gateway to pass through stripe-signature header unchanged. 2. Use raw body preservation for signature verification. 3. Test webhook endpoint bypassing gateway.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Webhook endpoints must preserve original headers
prevention.test_added: Test webhook with various gateway configurations

errors.title: Redis connection refused on wallet credit operation
errors.root_cause: Redis pod was OOM-killed during resource pressure. Wallet credit operations require Redis for atomic credit tracking. Without Redis, double-credit protection was bypassed.
errors.fix: 1. Add Redis connection retry with exponential backoff. 2. Fail-closed: reject wallet credits if Redis unavailable. 3. Add memory limits to Redis deployment. 4. Queue operations to Redis when it recovers.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Redis unavailable must fail wallet operations, not bypass safety
prevention.test_added: Test wallet operations during Redis outage
prevention.architectural_constraint: Critical safety checks must not be bypassed during outages

errors.title: Redis memory fragmentation causing high memory usage
errors.root_cause: High key churn (many SET/EXPIRE cycles) caused memory fragmentation. Used memory was 8GB but RSS was 14GB. Fragmentation ratio exceeded 1.5, causing eviction under memory pressure.
errors.fix: 1. Restart Redis to defragment memory. 2. Use ACTIVE_DEFRAG during low-traffic periods. 3. Reduce key churn by using longer TTLs. 4. Add memory fragmentation monitoring.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Redis memory fragmentation must be monitored
prevention.test_added: Long-running test with key churn patterns

errors.title: Node.js heap out of memory during batch processing
errors.root_cause: Daily reconciliation job loaded 100k orders into memory for processing. V8 heap limit (1.5GB) was exceeded causing process crash.
errors.fix: 1. Process orders in batches of 1000 using streaming. 2. Use --max-old-space-size=4096 for batch jobs. 3. Implement pagination for reconciliation queries. 4. Add memory monitoring to batch jobs.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Batch jobs must use streaming/pagination for large datasets
prevention.test_added: Load test with 100k+ records

errors.title: BullMQ job stuck in active state after worker crash
errors.root_cause: Worker processing wallet credit job was killed mid-execution. Job remained in 'active' state in Redis. Job was never completed and never moved to failed.
errors.fix: 1. Add stalled interval check to move stuck jobs to failed. 2. Implement job progress tracking with heartbeat. 3. Use lockTTL of 30s with automatic renewal. 4. Add monitoring for jobs stuck >5min.

prevention.ci_rule_added: Stalled job monitoring must alert on jobs >5min active
prevention.test_added: Test worker crash recovery scenarios
